pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates police report file at this exact path
export_result.sh line 11 and setup_task.sh line 66 reference this path
export_result.sh line 12 and setup_task.sh line 67 reference this path
setup_task.sh police report contains 'Main Street', 'Elm Avenue', 'Unit 1', 'Unit 2'; verifier.py checks for substring matches of 'main' and 'elm'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic traffic accident reconstruction task. Case ID XA-9920 involves a collision between a blue 2018 Honda Accord (Unit 1, traveling northbound) and a red 2020 Ford F-150 (Unit 2, turning left onto Elm Avenue) at the intersection of Main Street and Elm Avenue on 2023-10-15 at 14:30. The impact occurred at approximately 45 degrees with the front of Unit 1 striking the passenger side of Unit 2. All required labels (Main, Elm, Unit 1, Unit 2) and vehicle colors (Unit 1: blue, Unit 2: red) match the metadata claims. All file paths for outputs are correctly specified.
